_meta.source: PAN Applipedia public port specs (clean-room) + fwforge curation. Extend with: fwforge applipedia import <pan-export.xml>
_meta.note: Ports from public PAN documentation only. No Fortinet proprietary data. FortiGuard category names are public taxonomy.

apps._comment_transport: L3/L4 transport protocols — not controllable by app-control
apps._comment_p2p: Peer-to-peer file sharing (dynamic ports — absent from ports list)
apps._comment_proxy: Evasion and proxy apps (dynamic ports — absent from ports list)
apps._comment_vpn: VPN tunnel protocols (not transport — have specific ports)
apps._comment_security_tools: Enterprise security and endpoint management tools
apps._comment_vpn_ext: Additional VPN and remote access services
apps._comment_misc_final: Remaining common PAN App-IDs seen in enterprise configs
